title: Millimeter to Inch Converter
description: Industrial-grade conversion tool with precision validation, loss analysis, and confidence-adjusted output for engineering and manufacturing applications.

inputs.label: Value in Millimeters
inputs.businessContext: The linear dimension to be converted from millimeters to inches. Typical range for industrial parts: 0.1 mm to 10,000 mm.

businessContext_i18n.en: The linear dimension to be converted from millimeters to inches. Typical range for industrial parts: 0.1 mm to 10,000 mm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Milimetreden inçe dönüştürülecek doğrusal boyut. Endüstriyel parçalar için tipik aralık: 0,1 mm - 10.000 mm.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die lineare Abmessung, die von Millimetern in Zoll umgerechnet werden soll. Typischer Bereich für Industriekomponenten: 0,1 mm bis 10.000 mm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dimension linéaire à convertir de millimètres en pouces. Plage typique pour pièces industrielles : 0,1 mm à 10 000 mm.
businessContext_i18n.es: Dimensión lineal a convertir de milímetros a pulgadas. Rango típico para piezas industriales: 0.1 mm a 10,000 mm.
businessContext_i18n.ar: البعد الخطي المراد تحويله من الميليمتر إلى البوصة. النطاق النموذجي للأجزاء الصناعية: 0.1 مم إلى 10,000 مم.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the inch result. ISO 2768-m standard suggests 2-4 decimals for general tolerances.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the inch result. ISO 2768-m standard suggests 2-4 decimals for general tolerances.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İnç sonucu için ondalık basamak sayısı. ISO 2768-m standardı genel toleranslar için 2-4 ondalık basamak önerir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für das Zoll-Ergebnis. Die Norm ISO 2768-m empfiehlt 2–4 Dezimalstellen für allgemeine Toleranzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat en pouces. La norme ISO 2768-m recommande 2 à 4 décimales pour les tolérances générales.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para el resultado en pulgadas. El estándar ISO 2768-m sugiere 2-4 decimales para tolerancias generales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المنازل العشرية لنتيجة البوصة. معيار ISO 2768-m يقترح 2-4 منازل عشرية للتفاوتات العامة.

inputs.label: Tolerance (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturing tolerance in millimeters. Used to compute tolerance in inches and assess quality thresholds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Manufacturing tolerance in millimeters. Used to compute tolerance in inches and assess quality thresholds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Milimetre cinsinden üretim toleransı. İnç cinsinden toleransı hesaplamak ve kalite eşiklerini değerlendirmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fertigungstoleranz in Millimetern. Wird verwendet, um die Toleranz in Zoll zu berechnen und Qualitätsschwellen zu bewerten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tolérance de fabrication en millimètres. Utilisée pour calculer la tolérance en pouces et évaluer les seuils de qualité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tolerancia de fabricación en milímetros. Se utiliza para calcular la tolerancia en pulgadas y evaluar umbrales de calidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تفاوت التصنيع بالميليمتر. يُستخدم لحساب التفاوت بالبوصة وتقييم حدود الجودة.

inputs.label: Target Unit System
inputs.businessContext: Select the output unit system. Imperial outputs inches; metric outputs millimeters (for cross-check).

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the output unit system. Imperial outputs inches; metric outputs millimeters (for cross-check).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı birim sistemini seçin. Imperial inç çıktısı verir; metrik milimetre çıktısı verir (çapraz kontrol için).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie das Ausgabeeinheitensystem. Imperial gibt Zoll aus; metrisch gibt Millimeter aus (zur Gegenprüfung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez le système d'unités de sortie. Impérial donne des pouces ; métrique donne des millimètres (pour vérification croisée).
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione el sistema de unidades de salida. Imperial produce pulgadas; métrico produce milímetros (para verificación cruzada).
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختر نظام الوحدات للإخراج. النظام الإمبراطوري ينتج البوصات؛ النظام المتري ينتج المليمترات (للتحقق المتبادل).

inputs.label: Apply Six Sigma Adjustment
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies a 1.5 sigma shift to account for process drift (Six Sigma DMAIC methodology).

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies a 1.5 sigma shift to account for process drift (Six Sigma DMAIC methodology).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, proses kaymasını hesaba katmak için 1,5 sigma kayması uygular (Altı Sigma DMAIC metodolojisi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn aktiviert, wird eine 1,5-Sigma-Verschiebung zur Berücksichtigung von Prozessdrift angewendet (Six Sigma DMAIC-Methodik).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, applique un décalage de 1,5 sigma pour tenir compte de la dérive du processus (méthodologie Six Sigma DMAIC).
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, aplica un desplazamiento de 1.5 sigma para tener en cuenta la deriva del proceso (metodología DMAIC de Seis Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا كان صحيحًا، يطبق إزاحة 1.5 سيجما لمراعاة انحراف العملية (منهجية DMAIC لستة سيجما).

rules.message: Value in millimeters must be non-negative.
Tolerance must be greater than zero.
Precision must be between 0 and 6 decimal places.
Tolerance should not exceed the measured value (except zero).

thresholds.message: Tolerance exceeds 0.5 mm. Consider tightening for precision applications (ISO 2768-f).
Value is less than 1 mm. Ensure measurement instrument resolution is adequate (WERC guideline).
Six Sigma shift applied to large dimension. Verify process capability (Cpk > 1.33).

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
